title: Grilled Cherry BBQ Sausage
description: A sweet and savory summer sausage recipe featuring grilled cherries. Perfect for a quick dinner or outdoor gathering. This recipe can be adjusted to suit your preferred level of spiciness.
instructions: Cook sausages for 5-7 minutes per side, or until the internal temperature reaches 160°F (71°C).
While the sausages are cooking, mix the cherries, ketchup, and garlic in a saucepan over medium heat.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the cherries have broken down and the sauce has thickened.
Once the sausages are done, place them on the buns and top with the cherry BBQ sauce.
